summary: Codifies the inherited brain-checks CI gate as a governed standard: a new 04-policies/ci-checks-standard.md states that capabilities --check (anti-drift) and intent-gate are always blocking, docs-mesh is blocking by default with a narrow honest escape hatch (one continue-on-error only for a pre-existing unresolvable, plus a TODO and a ::warning::, never a fake-pass), and blesses a superset-generator allowance so a lane may ship a richer system-wide generator (e.g. Northwind's 08-ops/generate-capabilities.ps1) as long as CI still enforces the same three invariants. A hub guard keeps the template from silently dropping the gate.
